_comment: WS0 coverage matrix: ZeroBreach-V23.ps1 phase -> MITRE ATT&CK technique -> data source. Generated 2026-06-29. signature_source: externalized=data/*.json only; partial=mixed data+inline literals; inline=signature literals live in the .ps1 (AMSI/portability risk, externalize per WS1/WS2); n/a=behavioral/registry/cmdlet, no signature strings.

phases.name: ANTI-FORENSIC EVENT LOG AUDIT
phases.detects: Scans Security/System logs for event IDs 104/1102 (log clearing). Flags evidence of tampering.

mitre_techniques.name: Indicator Removal: Clear Windows Event Logs

phases.name: POWERSHELL SCRIPT BLOCK LOG AUDIT (EVENT 4104)
phases.detects: Examines PS Operational log 4104 for IEX/EncodedCommand/WebClient/reflection/VirtualAlloc patterns; excludes own footprint.

phases.name: PROCESS ANCESTRY & INJECTION AUDIT
phases.detects: Queries live Win32_Process command-lines for IEX/EncodedCommand/DownloadString/LOLBIN/injection keywords.

phases.name: LOLBIN ABUSE AUDIT
phases.detects: Enumerates 46 inline LOLBIN exe names running with suspicious args (http/AppData/Temp/.js/Base64/scrobj/UNC).

phases.name: AMSI BYPASS & ETW PATCH DETECTION
phases.detects: Checks AMSI provider regkey, AmsiEnable flag, ETW autologger Start value for disable/zero.

mitre_techniques.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools

phases.name: KNOWN MALWARE PROCESS IOC DATABASE MATCH
phases.detects: Compares running processes to RAT/miner/keylogger IOC name arrays; kills matches.

phases.name: BROWSER CACHE & SERVICE WORKER AUDIT
phases.detects: Detects browser cache dirs (Chrome/Edge/FF/Brave/Opera) as INFO artifacts.

phases.name: BROWSER EXTENSION SANITIZATION (HEURISTIC)
phases.detects: Walks Chrome/Edge/Brave extension dirs via Get-ExtensionRisk; flags CRIT/HIGH/POSSIBLE.

phases.name: BROWSER HIJACK — SHORTCUT & HOMEPAGE AUDIT
phases.detects: Inspects .lnk args (http/--load-extension/javascript:/data:) and Chrome homepage pref.

phases.name: TEMP / DOWNLOAD DIRECTORY ANOMALY SWEEP
phases.detects: Time-scoped scan of TEMP/Downloads/INetCache for executable/script files.

phases.name: RECENT DOCUMENTS & JUMP LIST SCRUB
phases.detects: Audits Recent/AutomaticDestinations/CustomDestinations for recent items (INFO).

phases.name: PREFETCH & SHIMCACHE ARTIFACT AUDIT
phases.detects: Scans Prefetch .pf for script/LOLBIN execution traces (WSCRIPT/MSHTA/CERTUTIL/RUNDLL32+APPDATA/POWERSHELL -ENC).

phases.name: CRYPTOGRAPHIC SYSTEM FILE VERIFICATION (SFC)
phases.detects: Runs sfc /scannow; skipped in Auto/GUI/Stealth.

phases.name: DISM COMPONENT STORE RESTORATION
phases.detects: Flushes wuauserv cache, flags SoftwareDistribution; DISM /RestoreHealth interactive only.

phases.name: SYSTEM32 UNSIGNED BINARY AUDIT
phases.detects: Validates Authenticode on recent System32 exe/dll/sys; flags unsigned/invalid as rootkit.

phases.name: NTFS PERMISSION INTEGRITY — CRITICAL PATHS
phases.detects: Audits ACLs on System32/SysWOW64/drivers for world-writable ACEs.

mitre_techniques.name: File and Directory Permissions Modification: Windows File and Directory Permissions Modification

phases.name: ALTERNATE DATA STREAM (ADS) PARASITE SCAN
phases.detects: Scans LOCALAPPDATA/TEMP/Downloads for non-$DATA ADS (excl Zone.Identifier).

phases.name: DEEP CLOAKED PARASITE SCAN (HIDDEN+SYSTEM ATTRIBUTES)
phases.detects: User-writable paths for Hidden+System exec/script files; capped 200.

mitre_techniques.name: Hide Artifacts: Hidden Files and Directories

phases.name: SCRIPT EXECUTION ASSOCIATION AUDIT
phases.detects: Checks .js/.vbs/.hta/.wsf handler bindings for non-txtfile hijacks.

mitre_techniques.name: Event Triggered Execution: Change Default File Association

phases.name: RUN / RUNONCE HEURISTIC SCRUB
phases.detects: Audits Run/RunOnce (HKCU/HKLM 64/32) for AppData/Temp/script/LOLBIN/IEX/EncodedCommand values.

mitre_techniques.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder

phases.name: IMAGE FILE EXECUTION OPTIONS (IFEO) SCRUB
phases.detects: Flags IFEO Debugger values and nonzero GlobalFlag (GFlags injection).

mitre_techniques.name: Event Triggered Execution: Image File Execution Options Injection

phases.name: APPINIT_DLLS KERNEL INJECTION SCRUB
phases.detects: Flags non-empty AppInit_DLLs (64/32-bit).

phases.name: WINLOGON / USERINIT / SHELL HIJACK DETECTION
phases.detects: Flags Winlogon Shell != explorer.exe and non-standard Userinit.

mitre_techniques.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Winlogon Helper DLL

phases.name: COM OBJECT HIJACK AUDIT (HKCU CLSID OVERRIDES)
phases.detects: Flags HKCU CLSID overrides (user COM hijack persistence).

mitre_techniques.name: Event Triggered Execution: Component Object Model Hijacking

phases.name: GPO LOCKDOWN — TASKMGR/REGEDIT/CMD DISABLED
phases.detects: Flags DisableTaskMgr/DisableRegistryTools/DisableCMD=1 (anti-forensic).

mitre_techniques.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools

phases.name: BROWSER HELPER OBJECT (BHO) PURGE
phases.detects: Time-scoped BHO regkeys (64/32) flagged as hijacker/spyware.

phases.name: SAFE MODE HIJACK (SAFEBOOT KEY AUDIT)
phases.detects: Flags unknown non-GUID SafeBoot Minimal/Network entries.

phases.name: ROGUE WIN32 SERVICE AUDIT
phases.detects: Flags service ImagePath with AppData/Temp/script/LOLBIN.

mitre_techniques.name: Create or Modify System Process: Windows Service

phases.name: TASK SCHEDULER DEEP AUDIT
phases.detects: Enumerates non-MS scheduled tasks + walks task XML for malicious Execute/Args.

phases.name: WMI EVENT FILTER / CONSUMER / BINDING AUDIT
phases.detects: Flags __EventFilter/__EventConsumer/__FilterToConsumerBinding (WMI persistence).

mitre_techniques.name: Event Triggered Execution: WMI Event Subscription

phases.name: BITS / POWERSHELL PROFILE / STARTUP PERSISTENCE
phases.detects: Active BITS jobs; PS profiles w/ IEX/DownloadString; Startup folder unsigned/recent.

mitre_techniques.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder

phases.name: DLL SEARCH ORDER HIJACK — PATH AUDIT
phases.detects: Tests PATH dirs for write access; flags unsigned recent .dll in writable dirs.

mitre_techniques.name: Hijack Execution Flow: DLL Search Order Hijacking

phases.name: HOSTS FILE INTEGRITY AUDIT
phases.detects: Flags non-standard hosts entries.

phases.name: DNS CACHE POISONING AUDIT & FLUSH
phases.detects: Flags DNS cache entries matching suspicious-domain IOCs; flushes cache.

phases.name: PROXY & WINHTTP POISON RESET
phases.detects: Flags ProxyEnable=1; resets proxy.

phases.name: LIVE TCP/UDP THREAT SOCKET TERMINATION
phases.detects: Flags stratum miner ports, AppData/Temp procs on odd ports, reverse-DNS C2 matches.

phases.name: IPC NULL SESSION / SMB / PORTPROXY AUDIT
phases.detects: Flags active portproxy forwarding rules (C2 tunneling).

phases.name: FIREWALL AUDIT & PERIMETER REVIEW
phases.detects: Flags non-MS inbound rules with public/Any exposure.

mitre_techniques.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify System Firewall

phases.name: ROGUE ROOT CERTIFICATE AUDIT (LM + USER)
phases.detects: Flags recently-added root CA certs (LM=CRIT, user=HIGH).

mitre_techniques.name: Subvert Trust Controls: Install Root Certificate

phases.name: BCD STORE — DRIVER SIGNING / TESTSIGNING AUDIT
phases.detects: Flags testsigning/nointegritychecks=Yes (unsigned driver loading).

mitre_techniques.name: Subvert Trust Controls: Code Signing Policy Modification

phases.name: LSA / WDIGEST / LSA PROTECTION AUDIT
phases.detects: Checks WDigest UseLogonCredential and RunAsPPL hardening.

phases.name: LOCAL ADMINISTRATOR GHOST ACCOUNT AUDIT
phases.detects: Flags enabled local accounts matching backdoor name patterns; logs admins.

phases.name: SAM / HIVENIGHTMARE (CVE-2021-36934) AUDIT
phases.detects: Flags world-readable SAM ACL (HiveNightmare); enumerates VSS.

mitre_techniques.name: OS Credential Dumping: Security Account Manager

phases.name: TOKEN / PRIVILEGE ABUSE — ELEVATED PROCS IN USER SPACE
phases.detects: Flags SYSTEM-context procs from user-writable paths via SID check.

phases.name: ACCESSIBILITY SHELL BACKDOOR (STICKY KEYS / UTILMAN)
phases.detects: Validates Authenticode on sethc/utilman/osk/magnify/narrator/displayswitch.

phases.name: NULL SESSION / NTLM LEVEL / FINAL LSA HARDENING
phases.detects: Audits LmCompatibilityLevel; suggests LSA hardening.

phases.name: WINDOWS HOOK / RAW INPUT KEYLOGGER DETECTION
phases.detects: Flags procs with user32/hid module access from user paths (hook keylogger).

phases.name: KEYLOGGER FILE & REGISTRY ARTIFACT SCAN
phases.detects: Scans for keystroke log files + 7 known keylogger regkeys (Ardamax/Spyrix/Refog/KGB...).

phases.name: CLIPBOARD MONITOR / SCREEN CAPTURE DETECTION
phases.detects: Flags procs named snag/screenshot/capture/clip from user paths.

phases.name: ACCESSIBILITY API / UIAUTOMATION KEYLOGGER CHECK
phases.detects: Flags procs using UIAutomation module from user paths.

phases.name: RANSOMWARE EXTENSION VELOCITY DETECTION
phases.detects: Scans doc folders for known ransomware extensions.

phases.name: HIGH ENTROPY FILE DETECTION (ENCRYPTED PAYLOAD)
phases.detects: Entropy>7.5 sampling of phase-51 files (encrypted/packed).

phases.name: RANSOM NOTE DETECTION
phases.detects: 11 ransom-note filename patterns over phase-51 walk (anchored regex).

phases.name: BACKUP PROCESS TAMPERING / BCDEDIT ABUSE
phases.detects: Flags recoveryenabled=No + backup deletion events 521/527/528.

phases.name: UNSIGNED / ANOMALOUS KERNEL DRIVER AUDIT
phases.detects: driverquery for Kernel + IsSigned=FALSE.

mitre_techniques.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Kernel Modules and Extensions

phases.name: HIDDEN PROCESS DISCREPANCY (WMI vs PS vs TASKLIST)
phases.detects: Cross-correlates 3 process enumerations to find rootkit-hidden procs.

phases.name: SERVICE REGISTRY DELTA — HIDDEN SERVICE OBJECTS
phases.detects: Registry-vs-SCM delta for hidden service objects.

phases.name: BOOTKIT / MBR INDICATORS
phases.detects: Flags winpe/safeboot AlternateShell BCD entries.

phases.name: C2 BEACON INTERVAL / HIGH-FREQ DNS DETECTION
phases.detects: Flags >10 DNS queries to same domain + odd established connections from non-system procs.

phases.name: DNS TUNNELING DETECTION
phases.detects: Flags long DNS labels (>40) and high subdomain depth (>6).

phases.name: RAT CONFIGURATION FILE & REGISTRY SCAN
phases.detects: Tests known RAT config file paths + regkeys from signatures.

phases.name: NAMED PIPE BACKDOOR AUDIT
phases.detects: Enumerates named pipes matching RAT/C2 framework patterns (meterpreter/cobaltstrike/njrat/havoc/sliver...).
phases.notes: inline C2 framework names SHOULD externalize

phases.name: CPU ABUSE & MINER PROCESS DETECTION
phases.detects: High-CPU procs matching miner names + miner config files (pool/stratum/xmr).

phases.name: MINER SCHEDULED TASK / SERVICE PERSISTENCE
phases.detects: Scheduled tasks with miner exe/keywords (xmr/stratum/pool/mining/coin).

phases.name: WORM AUTORUN & USB SPREAD DETECTION
phases.detects: autorun.inf + hidden exe on removable drives.

phases.name: NETWORK SHARE WORM PROPAGATION SCAN
phases.detects: Unsigned exe/script in open network shares (excl ADMIN/IPC/print).

phases.name: ADWARE / PUP / SPYWARE REGISTRY SCAN
phases.detects: Scans hardcoded adware/PUP regkeys (Conduit/SearchProtect/Trovi/Babylon/Delta...).

phases.name: INFO-STEALER ARTIFACT SCAN (REDLINE/RACCOON/VIDAR)
phases.detects: Procs matching stealer names + credential/wallet files in user paths.

phases.name: PROCESS HOLLOWING / INJECTION DETECTION
phases.detects: Procs with <3 modules, unsigned, in AppData/Temp (hollowing).

phases.name: FILELESS REGISTRY PAYLOAD DETECTION
phases.detects: Run/Environment/IFEO/CLSID values with base64 blobs (>100 chars).

mitre_techniques.name: Obfuscated Files or Information: Fileless Storage

phases.name: PHISHING / OVERLAY / FAKE BROWSER UI DETECTION
phases.detects: Procs named fakescreen/overlay/phish/credential-harvest.

phases.name: BOTNET C2 IP / IOC BLACKLIST CHECK
phases.detects: TCP connections reverse-DNS matching botnet dynamic-DNS (.onion/duckdns/zapto/myftp...).

phases.name: EXPLOIT KIT ARTIFACT & CVE-2021-36934 REMEDIATION
phases.detects: TEMP/LOCALAPPDATA files named shellcode/exploit/payload/cobalt/beacon.

phases.name: MACRO / OFFICE / OUTLOOK PERSISTENCE AUDIT
phases.detects: Flags VBAWarnings=1 + Outlook WebView HTML auto-exec regkey.

phases.name: EMAIL ATTACHMENT MALWARE SCAN (OUTLOOK CACHE)
phases.detects: Outlook attachment caches: hash match, content rules, exec/script ext, lure filenames. Wires Quarantine.

phases.name: MICROSOFT DEFENDER THREAT HISTORY CORRELATION
phases.detects: Get-MpThreat/Detection; flags Defender-caught resources still on disk (CRIT+Quarantine) else INFO.

phases.name: PROACTIVE ANTI-REINFECTION HARDENING
phases.detects: Office/Outlook macro+attachment security, WSH disable, Defender PUA + 6 ASR rules. INFO/opt-in.

phases.detects: Enumerates Defender path/process exclusions as hiding spots.

phases.detects: User-path walk for tunneling tools (nc/ncat/socat/chisel/plink/ligolo/frpc...).

phases.detects: Unsigned low-module procs from AppData/Temp (extended hollowing).
